title: Transcribe
guidance: Select a Whisper model, choose an input file, and start transcription.

inputVideo.label: Input file
inputVideo.help: Video or audio file to transcribe. Video supports burn-in output; audio supports text/SRT export only.

audioTracks.label: Audio tracks
audioTracks.defaultTrackMissing: Default track {{index}} not found; using track {{fallback}} instead.
audioTracks.help: Multiple tracks appear when recorded separately (e.g. OBS). Most files have only Track 1.
audioTracks.description: Audio tracks found in the file. Select the one to transcribe.

subtitleDefaults.label: Subtitle defaults
subtitleDefaults.helpSize: Subtitle font size in pixels. Adjust to match your video resolution.
subtitleDefaults.helpTextColor: Subtitle text color. White (#ffffff) is typical.
subtitleDefaults.helpOutlineColor: Subtitle outline color. Black (#000000) improves readability.
subtitleDefaults.sampleText: This is a sample subtitle so you can verify how the seed style will render in the burned-in output.
subtitleDefaults.previewNote: Approximate preview. Verify with the actual exported video.

subtitleStyle.dialogDescription: These seed values are burned into every subtitle at transcription time. Tweak them here and verify with the live preview.

whisperModel.label: Whisper model
whisperModel.tooltip: The engine that converts audio to text. Larger models are more accurate but slower.
whisperModel.descriptionLong: Whisper is an engine that converts audio into text. It's an open-source library developed by OpenAI and is free to use. All processing happens entirely on your PC; no data is sent externally. Download the model you want to use, then click "Use this" to select it.
whisperModel.descLargeV3Turbo: Fast and lightweight. Roughly half the download size of large-v3.
whisperModel.descLargeV3: Higher quality, recommended. Needs more resources to run.
whisperModel.updateNote: App updates may remove older models or add new ones.

model.install_confirm_body: Download {{model}} (~{{size}}). An internet connection is required.
model.diskFull: Not enough disk space. {{required}} required, {{available}} available
model.uninstall_confirm_body: This will delete {{modelName}} ({{size}}). You will need to re-download it to use it again.

gpuTool.label: Processing Device
gpuTool.tooltip: Choose CPU or a compatible NVIDIA GPU for transcription. GPU requires downloading CUDA/cuDNN runtimes (~1 GB) once; runs offline thereafter.
gpuTool.descriptionLong: Choose whether to run transcription on CPU or GPU. Using the GPU requires downloading the CUDA / cuDNN runtimes first. After the download, select the device you want to use.

cpu.name: CPU
cpu.description: No download required. Works on every machine.

gpu.name: GPU (CUDA / cuDNN)
gpu.description: Transcribes with an NVIDIA GPU. Downloads CUDA / cuDNN runtimes (~{{size}}) once.

gpuTool.unsupportedGpu: Your GPU ({{name}}) is not supported for GPU acceleration. An NVIDIA GPU is required.
gpuTool.noGpu: No GPU detected. An NVIDIA GPU is required.
gpuTool.install_confirm_body: Downloads NVIDIA CUDA / cuDNN (~{{size}}). An internet connection is required. Assets come from GitHub Releases.
gpuTool.install_license_value: NVIDIA cuDNN SLA / CUDA EULA / cuBLAS BSD
gpuTool.delete_confirm_body: Deletes the downloaded CUDA / cuDNN files ({{size}}). GPU execution will require a fresh download to re-enable.
gpuTool.toast_download_failed_network: Network disconnected. Check your connection and try again.
gpuTool.toast_download_failed_checksum: The downloaded file is corrupted (SHA-256 mismatch). Please try again.
gpuTool.toast_download_failed_extract: Extraction failed. Check available disk space and try again.

footer.privacyNote: All processing runs locally on this PC

guard.noInput: Select an input file to transcribe.
guard.noModel: Download or select a Whisper model.
guard.noAudio: The selected video has no audio track.

drawer.title: Transcription
drawer.subtitle: Review Whisper settings and the audio track, then run.

wordSubtitle.label: Word-level transcription (experimental)
wordSubtitle.description: Generates subtitles in short 1–3 word chunks. An experimental feature for English audio. Results with Japanese audio may split words unnaturally.

dialog.cancelBody: The current transcription will be stopped and any partial results will be discarded.

toast.modelDownloadFailedNetwork: The download stopped because the network connection was lost. Check your connection and try again.
toast.gpuFallback: GPU was unavailable; running on CPU. This may take longer than usual.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.autoLineBreakHelp: After transcription completes, pack-wrap each line that exceeds the display width (drop existing breaks and refill to the full width). Break positions are calculated from font size and video resolution. Line breaks are removed when exporting text.
advanced.vadFilterHelp: Enable/disable voice activity detection filter. When enabled, only segments containing speech are processed.
advanced.vadThresholdHelp: Confidence threshold for speech detection (0.0–1.0). Lower values detect more speech but may increase false positives.
advanced.minSpeechDurationHelp: Minimum duration of speech to be recognized (ms). Shorter speech segments are ignored.
advanced.minSilenceDurationHelp: Minimum silence duration to split segments (ms). Shorter values produce more granular subtitles.
advanced.beamSizeHelp: Beam search width affecting recognition accuracy. Larger values improve accuracy but slow down processing.
advanced.languageHelp: Target language for transcription. Auto-detect infers the language from the audio.

fontPicker.title: Select default subtitle font
fontPicker.description: Click a font to set it as the default. Adding and downloading fonts is a paid-version feature.

note.missingRareKanjiHelp: This font omits a small set of post-jōyō kanji (塡 剝 頰 and similar).  Subtitles containing those characters may fall back to another face mid-word.

toast.downloadUnavailable: {{name}} is not yet available — please try again later
toast.uninstalledFallback: {{name}} was removed — {{count}} subtitle(s) reverted to the default font

uninstallConfirm.title: Remove {{name}}?
uninstallConfirm.body: {{name}} is used by {{count}} subtitle(s). Removing it will revert them to the default font.

fontPicker.tofuNote: Characters not included in the font appear as □ or ? (e.g. using Japanese with an English-only font).

batchDownload.buttonTooltip: Download every font that isn't installed yet
